signals.title: USD — Hot CPI + Fed Stance
signals.text: US CPI surprise reignites inflation fears, driving DXY to 98.29 as US 10Y yields climb to 4.463%. Fed's Goolsbee maintains policy independence stance while the market shifts toward a 'higher-for-longer' regime. Bear steepener in the US yield curve (2s10s +56.3bp) confirms tightening cycle dominance. USD/EUR 175bp carry advantage and USD/JPY 300bp spread sustain the dollar bid against low-yielders. Watch for 17 Jun Fed meeting to confirm hold duration.

signals.title: AUD/JPY — G8 Bilateral Theme + Carry
signals.text: AUD/JPY at 114.114 reflects a dominant G8 bilateral theme as AUD outperforms (+0.563%) and JPY lags (-0.551%). The 360bp RBA-BoJ carry premium (RBA 4.35% vs BoJ 0.75%) remains the primary driver. Retail sentiment shows 85% short AUD/JPY, diverging from COT LF net long +58,994 (78.3% long), suggesting institutional carry-seeking is overwhelming retail contrarians. Risk of retail capitulation if price holds above 114.00. Watch for BoJ verbal intervention risk as JPY weakness persists.

signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence + Inflation Survey
signals.text: NZD/USD at 0.5955 faces a sharp divergence between speculative positioning and central bank bias. COT LF net short -19,294 (18.5% long) shows specs are heavily fading the RBNZ, despite a hawkish market bias toward a hike. The upcoming RBNZ Survey of Inflation Expectations (13 May) is the critical catalyst; a hot print risks a massive short-squeeze as specs are forced to cover into a hawkish RBNZ stance. USD/NZD 150bp carry favors USD but is vulnerable to NZD-specific hawkishness.

signals.title: USD/JPY — Correlation Break + Carry
signals.text: USD/JPY at 157.586 shows a significant correlation break vs US 10Y yields (corr=+0.595 vs norm=+0.150, z=-2.20σ). The pair is tracking US yields more tightly than historical norms, ignoring traditional safe-haven JPY flows despite VIX at 18.0. Fed 3.75% vs BoJ 0.75% (300bp spread) keeps the pair bid. Intervention risk remains the primary upside cap; watch 160.00 for BoJ action if the 10Y-driven rally accelerates.
